description_long: This is a single bed with a robust, dark wooden frame featuring both a headboard and a footboard. The bed is topped with a muted reddish-brown sheet that covers a visible mattress, and a single white pillow is placed at the head. The frame has a simple, rectangular design with thick, squared legs and solid panels at both ends, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The wood grain is visible, adding a touch of natural texture to the otherwise smooth surfaces. The bed's proportions suggest it is suitable for one person, making it ideal for use in urban settings such as dormitories, hostels, or compact apartments. The overall look is functional and classic, with no ornate details or additional storage features.
description: A sturdy, single wooden bed with a reddish-brown sheet, white pillow, and both headboard and footboard. The design is simple, traditional, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the reddish-brown sheet, white pillow, and both headboard and footboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the footboard, the width of the bed, and the pillow positioned at the far end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow now on the right, showing the same features as view 0 from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the headboard and the pillow, with the footboard in the background.
